title: hymenocallis littoralis
intro: Hymenocallis littoralis, also known as the sea island spider lily or coast spider lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Hymenocallis littoralis include its ability to help relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce swelling and pain. Hymenocallis littoralis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a variety of ailments, and it is also used in traditional cooking and as an ornamental plant.
